metadata.description: WVS L0 (item-level) SES fingerprints. Each Q-code gets a 4D fingerprint vector [rho_escol, rho_Tam_loc, rho_sexo, rho_edad]. Items with parent_construct have exact loading_gamma; orphans get approximate candidate_loading_gamma via cosine-nearest construct.
